findings.description: The PDF contains an annotated diagram of a shellstock sale tag — a bordered box with arrows pointing from explanatory callout text to specific tag fields. This substantive diagram (showing the physical format of a required tag with spatial relationships between annotations and tag elements) is completely absent in the HTML. The arrows, box borders, and visual spatial layout are all lost.
findings.evidence: PDF shows a central bordered 'SALE TAG' with arrows connecting left-side callouts (e.g., 'Harvest Date; may be mo/dy/yr…', '90 Day tag retention notice') and right-side callouts (e.g., 'Dealer Name, Address, & Certification Number', 'Type of shellfish…') to specific fields on the tag. HTML renders all text content linearly without any diagram, borders, or arrows.
